name: Spellcasting (Cleric)
rechargeSummary: Long rest
scalingSummary: Full caster; prepared (Wisdom); domain spells always prepared
mechanicalSummary: Prepare cleric spells using Wisdom. Full caster progression. 3 cantrips at L1. Prepared casters have access to full class list up to their max spell level, selecting which to prepare each day.

evidence.pointer: Cleric casterType=full, prepared caster

name: Channel Divinity
rechargeSummary: Short or long rest
scalingSummary: 1 use at L2, 2 at L6, 3 at L18
mechanicalSummary: Channel divine power for domain-specific effects. Base option: Turn Undead (action, each undead within 30 ft makes Wis save or be turned for 1 minute or until damaged). Each domain grants additional CD options.

evidence.pointer: Cleric L2: Channel Divinity; L6/L18: CD improvement; featureDescriptions

notes: Shared resource across all CD options. Turn Undead is universal; each domain adds options.

name: Destroy Undead
trigger: When turning undead (rider on Turn Undead CD)
resourceCostSummary: Rides on Turn Undead (no additional CD cost)
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: CR thresholds: 1/2 at L5, 1 at L8, 2 at L11, 3 at L14, 4 at L17
mechanicalSummary: When using Turn Undead, undead of CR at or below the threshold that fail their save are destroyed instead of turned.

evidence.pointer: Cleric L5/8/11/14/17: Destroy Undead; featureDescriptions

notes: Rider on Turn Undead — not a separate action.

name: Divine Intervention
resourceCostSummary: 1 use (recharges only on success, or after 7 days)
rechargeSummary: 7 days on failure; immediate on success
scalingSummary: d100 roll: need ≤ cleric level to succeed; L20 auto-succeeds
mechanicalSummary: As an action, call on your deity. Roll percentile dice: if result ≤ cleric level, the deity intervenes (DM adjudicates effect). On success, can't use again for 7 days. At L20, auto-succeeds once per week.

evidence.pointer: Cleric L10: Divine Intervention; L20: improvement; featureDescriptions

name: Channel Divinity: Preserve Life (Life Domain)
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Restore HP = 5 × cleric level, distributed among creatures within 30 ft (max half their HP)
mechanicalSummary: As an action, restore HP equal to 5× cleric level, divided among chosen creatures within 30 ft. Cannot heal a creature above half its max HP.

evidence.pointer: life-domain L2: Channel Divinity: Preserve Life

name: Warding Flare (Light Domain)
trigger: When attacked by a creature within 30 ft that you can see
rechargeSummary: Long rest
mechanicalSummary: Impose disadvantage on the attack roll. Attacker must not be immune to being blinded. At L6, can use on attacks against allies within 30 ft.

evidence.pointer: light-domain L1: Warding Flare; L6: Improved Flare

name: Channel Divinity: Radiance of the Dawn (Light Domain)
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action, dispel magical darkness within 30 ft. Each hostile creature within 30 ft makes Con save or takes 2d10 + cleric level radiant damage (half on success).

evidence.pointer: light-domain L2: Channel Divinity: Radiance of the Dawn

name: Corona of Light (Light Domain)
rechargeSummary: At will (dismiss as action)
mechanicalSummary: Activate a 60-ft bright/30-ft dim sunlight aura for 1 minute. Enemies in the bright light have disadvantage on saves vs fire or radiant damage spells.

evidence.pointer: light-domain L17: Corona of Light

name: Wrath of the Storm (Tempest Domain)
trigger: When a creature within 5 ft hits you with an attack
rechargeSummary: Long rest
scalingSummary: Uses = Wisdom modifier (min 1); damage 2d8 lightning or thunder
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to deal 2d8 lightning or thunder damage; Dex save for half.

evidence.pointer: tempest-domain L1: Wrath of the Storm

name: Channel Divinity: Destructive Wrath (Tempest Domain)
trigger: When rolling lightning or thunder damage
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Use CD to deal maximum damage instead of rolling for lightning or thunder damage.

evidence.pointer: tempest-domain L2: Channel Divinity: Destructive Wrath

notes: Not an action — reactive CD use modifying a damage roll.

name: War Priest (War Domain)
rechargeSummary: Long rest
mechanicalSummary: After taking the Attack action, make one weapon attack as a bonus action. Limited uses per long rest.

evidence.pointer: war-domain L1: War Priest

name: Channel Divinity: Guided Strike (War Domain)
trigger: When making an attack roll (after seeing the roll)
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Gain +10 to an attack roll after seeing the d20 but before DM says hit/miss.

evidence.pointer: war-domain L2: Channel Divinity: Guided Strike

name: Channel Divinity: War God's Blessing (War Domain)
trigger: When a creature within 30 ft makes an attack roll (after seeing the roll)
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to grant +10 to an ally's attack roll after seeing the d20 but before DM result.

evidence.pointer: war-domain L6: Channel Divinity: War God's Blessing

name: Channel Divinity: Touch of Death (Death Domain)
trigger: When hitting a creature with a melee attack
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Use CD to deal extra necrotic damage equal to 5 + (2 × cleric level) on a melee hit.

evidence.pointer: death-domain L2: Channel Divinity: Touch of Death

name: Channel Divinity: Twilight Sanctuary (Twilight Domain)
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action, create a 30-ft-radius sphere of dim light for 1 minute. At end of each turn of a creature in the sphere, choose to grant that creature 1d6+cleric level temp HP or end one charmed/frightened condition.

evidence.pointer: twilight-domain L2: Channel Divinity: Twilight Sanctuary

name: Steps of Night (Twilight Domain)
trigger: When in dim light or darkness
rechargeSummary: Long rest
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed for 1 minute while in dim light or darkness.

evidence.pointer: twilight-domain L6: Steps of Night

name: Voice of Authority (Order Domain)
trigger: When casting a spell of 1st+ level that targets an ally
mechanicalSummary: After casting a leveled spell targeting an ally, that ally can use its reaction to make one weapon attack against a creature of your choice.

evidence.pointer: order-domain L1: Voice of Authority

name: Blessing of the Forge (Forge Domain)
rechargeSummary: At end of long rest (choose new item)
mechanicalSummary: At end of each long rest, touch one nonmagical armor or weapon to make it +1 until your next long rest.

evidence.pointer: forge-domain L1: Blessing of the Forge

name: Channel Divinity: Path to the Grave (Grave Domain)
rechargeSummary: CD recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action, curse a creature within 30 ft. The next time an ally hits it before end of your next turn, the creature has vulnerability to all of that attack's damage.

evidence.pointer: grave-domain L2: Channel Divinity: Path to the Grave

notes: Setup ability — requires ally follow-up for massive damage.

name: Sentinel at Death's Door (Grave Domain)
trigger: When a creature within 30 ft suffers a critical hit
rechargeSummary: Long rest
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to turn a critical hit against an ally within 30 ft into a normal hit.

evidence.pointer: grave-domain L6: Sentinel at Death's Door

name: Emboldening Bond (Peace Domain)
rechargeSummary: Long rest
scalingSummary: Uses = PB; targets scale; duration 10 minutes
mechanicalSummary: As an action, bond PB creatures within 30 ft for 10 minutes. While bonded and within 30 ft, a creature can add 1d4 to an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw once per turn.

evidence.pointer: peace-domain L1: Emboldening Bond

name: Protective Bond (Peace Domain)
trigger: When a bonded creature is about to take damage
mechanicalSummary: Another bonded creature within 30 ft can use its reaction to teleport to the damaged creature and take the damage in its place.

evidence.pointer: peace-domain L6: Protective Bond
